items.title: No-grounds eviction debate splits WA tenants and landlords, as polling shows support for reform
items.summary: Evicting a tenant without cause offers landlords a simple way out, but the issue can be much more complex than it appears. One such example of that complexity is Eleanor Kahlo's case of her no-grounds eviction.
